Affix.Name: Scroll of the Embered City's Hero
Affix.Desc: When a nearby party member triggers a Nightsoul Burst, the equipping character regenerates 6 Energy.

Affix.Name: Scroll of the Embered City's Hero
Affix.Desc: When the equipping character triggers an Elemental Reaction involving their Elemental Type, all nearby party members of Elemental Types involved in that reaction gain 12% All Elemental and Physical DMG Bonus for 10s. When the equipping character is in Nightsoul's Blessing when triggering this, an additional 28% All Elemental and Physical DMG Bonus will be granted to characters for 20s. The above effect can be triggered even if the character is off-field. DMG Bonuses provided by Artifact Sets with the same name will not stack.

EQUIP_RING.Name: Wandering Scholar's Claw Cup
EQUIP_RING.Desc: A strange goblet strikingly akin in shape to a dragon's claw. Its maker must have made it with something special in mind.

EQUIP_NECKLACE.Name: Mountain Ranger's Beacon
EQUIP_NECKLACE.Desc: A guidepost used by mountain rangers to mark out paths. Their bird-feather shapes make them very eye-catching indeed.

EQUIP_DRESS.Name: Magical Warrior's Feather Mask
EQUIP_DRESS.Desc: A feather mask with falcon-esque plumage. Many legends surround this object.

EQUIP_BRACER.Name: Beast Tamer's Talisman
EQUIP_BRACER.Desc: A flower carved from flint and Drakite, signifying that its bearer is qualified to become a beast tamer.

EQUIP_SHOES.Name: Mystic's Gold Platter
EQUIP_SHOES.Desc: A golden plate shaped like a sun. The draconic patterns on it seem to symbolize the cycle of life and death.
